Screenshot

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

## About PyTorch Conference

7-8 April 2026 | Paris, France

Don't miss your opportunity to shape the future of generative AI/ML! Join us at the PyTorch Conference Europe 2026, where collaboration, innovation, and progress intersect in the cutting-edge open source machine learning framework. This conference brings together leading researchers, developers, and academics, facilitating collaboration and pushing forward end-to-end machine learning.

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

"This was hands-down one of the best organized and most enjoyable conferences I've been to in the last many years."

"There is a reason why I brought so much of my engineering team here, there is absolutely no replacement for the in-person connection and collaboration that you get from the folks who you're working with regularly in GitHub, on the Pytorch Forums, and even inside your own company."

"You never know where the next conversation will take you and what opportunities it will unlock in your career."

"It has been unanimously saluted as a memorable experience, featuring insightful discussions, innovative ideas, and a collaborative atmosphere that showcased the best of our community."

"Thank you again for creating this standard-setting conference, I am already looking forward to next year's event and the opportunity to continue pushing the boundaries of what's possible with the PyTorch ecosystem."

Logo

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

## Why Sponsor

Sponsoring the PyTorch Conference Europe is a strategic investment in the "Intelligence Layer" of your business. As the framework of choice for the world's leading AI researchers and engineers, PyTorch is the engine driving the transition from experimental RAG to production-grade Agent AI.

By joining us in 2026, you'll integrate your brand into the high-density hub of the AI/ML ecosystem, gaining direct access to the practitioners and decision-makers who define the modern AI stack.

2026 Anticipated Attendance

600 In-Person Attendees

The Power of the PyTorch Audience

Targeted Technical Density

40% of the audience are specialized AI/ML engineers and researchers

App &amp; Infrastructure Development 15% are developers and engineers focused on the AI lifecycle

focused on the AI lifecycle

Key Benefits for Your Organization

Elevate Your Technical Authority

Position your brand at the center of the AI revolution. Showcase your commitment to the PyTorch mission

and gain recognition as a primary driver of open-

source AI advancement.

Recruit Elite Specialized Talent The competition for AI talent is fierce. Use this platform to highlight your engineering culture and solve your most difficult hiring challenges by meeting

the brightest minds in the field.

Attendee estimates are based on registration trends from previous events and

THE LINUX FOUNDATION

Executive Decision-Makers

20% are technical leaders and strategic decision-makers

The Future of Research 15% represent academia, venture capital, and industry analysts

and industry analysts

Forge High-Value Partnerships Move beyond casual networking. Engage with a concentrated group of technical contributors and industry peers to discover collaborative opportunities in hardware acceleration and model deployment.

Accelerate Market Adoption

Demonstrate your thought leadership and latest tooling directly to the power users who decide which platforms, libraries, and infrastructures become the enterprise standard.

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

## Who Attends PyTorch Conference Europe

AI Engineers, ML Engineers, Researchers, Data Scientists, Robotics Engineers

40% of audience

Executive Leaders, Architects, Technical Managers, Product Managers,

20% of audience

20% of audience

2026 S PONSORSHIP

## Sponsorships at a Glance

Availability may vary. Contact sponsorships@linuxfoundation.org to confirm availability and secure your sponsorship today.

|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | DIAMOND                                                       | GOLD                                                          | SILVER                                                        | BRONZE                                                        | STARTUP                                                       | NON-PROFIT                                                    |
|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------|
| Speaking Opportunity: Content must be approved by the Program Chairs. No sales and marketing passes are allowed. Session time based on in-place                                                                                           | 5-Minute Keynote or Break Session                             | Break Session                                                 |                                                               |                                                               |                                                               |                                                               |
| Sponsored Session Attendee List: Opt in Only                                                                                                                                                                                              | (if breakout session)                                         |                                                               |                                                               |                                                               |                                                               |                                                               |
| Promotion of Activity in Sponsor Booth: demo, give away, or other activity of your choosing will be published in the following activity/time slots:                                                                                       | Promotion of (2) in-place activities/time slots               | Promotion of (1) in-place activities/time slots               | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    |                                                               |                                                               |
| Attendee Registration Contact List: Only in-place                                                                                                                                                                                         | (list provided)                                               | (list provided)                                               |                                                               |                                                               |                                                               |                                                               |
| Social Media Promotion: From PyTorch X-Hound Team: All posts must be approved by the PyTorch Foundation.                                                                                                                                  | 1 Group Post and 1 Group Post                                 | 1 Group Post                                                  |                                                               |                                                               |                                                               |                                                               |
| Access to Event Press/Analyst List: Control shared on week prior to the event, your own or your own team. Social Promotion Card: A graphic featuring your company logo alongside the official conference-pending event will be announced. | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    |                                                               |                                                               |                                                               |                                                               |
| Recognition During Opening Keynote Session                                                                                                                                                                                                | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    |
| Logo Recognition in Pre-Conference Event Marketing                                                                                                                                                                                        | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    |
| Logo Recognition on Event Signage and Website                                                                                                                                                                                             | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    |
| Marketing Kit: Event branding and social media posts provide ed to promote your attendance and presence at the event.                                                                                                                     | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    |
| Collateral Distribution: Laid out in a prominent location near registration onsite.                                                                                                                                                       | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    |
| Exhibit Space                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | (1) tabletop, 2 chairs, 5 amps of power, power strip and wifi | (1) tabletop, 2 chairs, 5 amps of power, power strip and wifi | (1) tabletop, 2 chairs, 5 amps of power, power strip and wifi | (1) tabletop, 2 chairs, 5 amps of power, power strip and wifi | (1) tabletop, 2 chairs, 5 amps of power, power strip and wifi | (1) tabletop, 2 chairs, 5 amps of power, power strip and wifi |
| Lead Retrieval: Live scans, real time ranking and ability to take notes on captured leads. To be used at booth only.                                                                                                                      | (1) Device                                                    | (1) Device                                                    | (1) Device                                                    | (1) Device                                                    | App Only                                                      | No physical device provided.                                  |
| Conference Attendee Passes: To be used for booth staff, attendees, and guests                                                                                                                                                             | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | No physical device provided.                                  |
| 20% Discount on Additional Conference Passes: Unlimited usage while passes are available for sale.                                                                                                                                        | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | No                                                            |
| Post Event Data Report: Provides event demographics and additional details on event performance.                                                                                                                                          | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | (in-place)                                                    | No                                                            |
| Sponsorship Cost                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | $50,000                                                       | $33,000                                                       | $18,000                                                       | $8,000                                                        | $4,000                                                        | $4,000                                                        |

Due to the nature of the exhibitor benefits at each level, pavements or sponsorships shared with multiple companies/entities are not allowed.

*PyTorch reserves the right to increase/decrease the number of available sponsorships and updates deliverables based on venue restrictions.

*Start-ups, Non-Profit, and VC's must meet the below criteria:

Start-up Sponsorship: Businesses must be under 3 years old, have less than $5M in annual revenue, and employ fewer than 30 people.

Non-Profit Sponsorship: Requires proof of legal non-profit status.

$4,000 $4,000

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

## Promotional Marketing Opportunities

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

## Attendee T-Shirt

Showcase your logo on the attendee t-shirt! Every attendee at the event will receive an event t-shirt. Our designers always create late-fashion shirts that are worn for years to come. Includes your logo on sleeve of shirt. Pricing includes single color logo imprint. Full color logo imprint available at an additional cost.

## Session Recording

$7,500 · 1 Available Extend your presence long after the live conference concludes with the session recording sponsorship. All session recordings will be published on the PyTorch Foundation YouTube channel after the event. Benefits include:

- · Sponsor recognition slide with logo at the beginning of each video recording

of each video recording

- · Sponsor recognition

## Lanyards

$5,000 · 1 Available

The opportunity for

to wear your logo.

to lanyard design.

gradient colors).

## Break + Lunch

$5,000 · 2 Available

Sponsorship includes

prominent branding

at all break &amp;

lunch stations for one day of the

event.

## Wireless Access

$5,000 · 1 Available

The opportunity for a PyTorch conference attendee

to wear your logo.

to lanyard design.

$5,000 · 2 Available

## Break + Lunch

$5,000 · 2 Available

$5,000 · 1 Available

Sponsorship includes

prominent branding

at all break &amp;

lunch stations for one day of the

event.

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

## Diversity Scholarship

$2,500 · 1 Unlimited

The Diversity Scholarship fund supports individuals who may not otherwise have the opportunity to attend PyTorch Conference Europe. Diversity scholarships support traditionally underrepresented and/or marginalized groups in the technology and/or open source communities including, but not limited to, persons identifying as LGBTQIA+, women, people of color, and/or persons with disabilities. Scholarships are granted to active community members who are not being assisted or sponsored by a company or organization, and are unable to attend for financial reasons.

Showcase your organization's support for this important initiative and help remove obstacles for underrepresented attendees. Benefits include:

- · Logo and link on conference website.
- · Logo recognition on rotating slides before and after keynotes
- · Sponsor recognition in scholarship acceptance notifications
- · Sponsor recognition on the conference website

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

![Image](data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAB8AAAAfCAIAAACQzIFuAAAAKUlEQVR4nO3MQQ0AAAgEILV/5zOFmw8IQCepM3NX2+12u91ut9vtL/cFbC0DO4SfmdQAAAAASUVORK5CYII=)

![Image](data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAB8AAAAeCAIAAABbkFLLAAAAKElEQVR4nO3MQQ0AAAgEILV/57ODmz8IQCepN/NX2+12u91ut9vtRws8dAM5nmHtgwAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==)

![Image](data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAB8AAAAgCAIAAABl4DQWAAAAKElEQVR4nO3MQQEAAAQEMPTvfFJ42QKsk9SZuavtdrvdbrfb7faH+wKcogM9Mma7cwAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==)

![Image](data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAB8AAAAqCAIAAADEexdwAAAALElEQVR4nO3MQQ0AAAgEILV/5zOFmw8IQCepM3NX2+12u91ut9vtdrvd/nRfqbYDUVJDTggAAAAASUVORK5CYII=)

Women and Non-Binary in PyTorch Lunch $5,000 · 1 Available All those who identify as women or non-binary attending PyTorch Conference Europe are invited to join this special lunch program featuring discusion around diversity, equity, and inclusivity. The sponsor offers this event positions themselves as an organization that fosters an ongoing conversation on the need for a diverse and inclusive open source community.

Benefits include: Recognition on the conference website Program listed on the official conference schedule Sponsor logo recognition on onsite signage and pre-event email

- · Sponsor recognition on onsite signage and
- pre-event email
